## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New provider / integration
- [ ] Feature or improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Screenshots

<!-- For any UI change, include a before/after captured in DEMO=1 mode. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check server.js` passes and the app boots (`DEMO=1 node server.js`).
- [ ] All routes render without console errors.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified in the description).
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, real IPs, hostnames or personal data added.
- [ ] Any feature added on desktop is also reachable on mobile.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed.
